questionText: The archaeological discovery in the region has ______ many previous theories about early human migration.
explanation: 'Challenged' (meydan okumak/sorgulatmak). Yeni keşif eski teorileri sorgulattı.

questionText: The most powerful ---- to parachuting is fear, but one should also take its high cost into account, as  total outfit for parachuting can be extremely expensive.
Although the team faced numerous challenges during the project, ______.
options: they decided to give up immediately
they were able to complete it on time
no one wanted to help them

questionText: The factory had to close down ______ the severe economic crisis.
The rise of artificial intelligence raises important ethical and legal questions.
options: Yapay zekanın yükselişi önemli etik ve yasal soruları gündeme getiriyor.
Yapay zeka geliştikçe etik ve hukuksal sorunlar da artmaya başladı.
Hukuk ve etik kuralları yapay zekanın gelişimiyle yeniden tartışılıyor.
Yapay zekanın sunduğu imkanlar kadar yarattığı etik sorunlar da büyüktür.
Etik ve yasal olarak yapay zekanın sınırları hala belirlenmiş değildir.

questionText: By the time we ______ at the station, the train had already left.
explanation: By the time + V2, had V3 kalıbı.

questionText: The internet has revolutionized the way we communicate. From social media to instant messaging, we are more connected than ever. ______. This constant availability can sometimes be overwhelming.
options: However, there is a dark side to this constant connectivity.
Many people still prefer traditional letters.
The cost of internet is decreasing every day.
Social media is a great tool for marketing.

questionText: (I) The Renaissance was a period of great artistic change. (II) It began in Italy and spread to the rest of Europe. (III) Most people in the Middle Ages were farmers. (IV) Famous artists like Da Vinci lived during this time. (V) It marked the end of the Middle Ages.
explanation: III numaralı cümle genel köylülükten bahsediyor, Rönesans akışını bozuyor.

questionText: It wasn't until the end of the 19th century that scientists understood atoms.
options: Scientists understood atoms throughout the 19th century.
Before the 19th century ended, atoms were well understood.
Scientists first understood atoms only when the 19th century was ending.
Atoms were discovered at the beginning of the 19th century.
No one cared about atoms until the 20th century.
